function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "defer", "action_id": "recheck_5min", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["E0 evidence level with background:true suggests benign equipment behavior", "5 questions already asked, no escalation — no need to surface to operator now", "Hand-set prior (n=0) is weak; E0 outcome supports lower probability than the assumption"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.05, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If the anomaly repeats or escalates to E1+ on recheck, or if robot diagnostic data shows actual perimeter intrusion vs. internal motion noise"}
